theme_archetype.description: Ultra-premium, cinematic dark editorial. Reconciles the high energy of live football with an elite, analytical luxury brand feel. Employs deep midnight navy, generous whitespace, and sharp metallic silver/chrome accents.

fonts.headings: PP Neue Machina, Cabinet Grotesk, sans-serif
fonts.body: JetBrains Mono, IBM Plex Mono, monospace

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter).
Never use Inter or generic sans for headings.
Data points, numbers, and stats MUST use the monospace font.
Overlines/labels must be uppercase, tiny, and widely spaced.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, utilizing generous p-12, p-16, p-24 for macro layout, tight gap-4, gap-6 for micro data grids.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol. Asymmetrical. Mode A (Tetris Grid) for Landing. Mode B (Control Room) for Dashboard views.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align text blocks. Never center everything.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use border-white/5 or border-white/10 to create technical grid lines.

components_strategy.cards: Avoid default Shadcn rounded cards. Use Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]. Zero or very small border radius (rounded-none or rounded-sm) for a sharp, editorial feel.
components_strategy.buttons: Flat metallic or transparent with sharp borders. Hover states must increase brightness and text contrast.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts with customized tooltips (glassmorphism). Use monochromatic lines or specific segment colors. Hide axis lines, keep grid lines very subtle (white/5).
components_strategy.forms_inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized: bg-transparent, border-b only or sharp rectangular borders. No focus rings—use bottom border highlights instead.
components_strategy.navigation: Sticky glass header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050914]/70 border-b border-white/10). Hidden hamburger on desktop—full links visible.

animations_and_interactions.scroll_reveals: Framer Motion. Staggered fade-up and slight scale-in (0.98 to 1).
animations_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must have distinct hover states. Slight lift (-translate-y-1) for cards. High-contrast text on hover.
animations_and_interactions.custom_cursor: Implement a custom cursor: a subtle silver ring (mix-blend-difference) that expands when hovering over interactive elements.
animations_and_interactions.page_transitions: Smooth fade out/in between the 4 main views.

the_3d_element.concept: A premium, rotating 3D football dominating the hero section.
the_3d_element.material: Dark glossy or metallic material. High roughness for pentagons, high metalness for hexagons.
the_3d_element.lighting: Dynamic directional lights (e.g., cold blue from one side, stark white from the other) to create dramatic rim lighting against the dark midnight navy background.

landing.structure: Nav + Hero with 3D football + Feature preview strips (Live Pulse, Moments, Strategies, ROI).
landing.visuals: Massive PP Neue Machina typography contrasting with technical monospace sub-labels.

heatmap.structure: Elongated world/country heatmap + fan segmentation stats panel.
heatmap.data_vis: Custom grid or Recharts scatter/treemap for the heatmap, colored by the 5 segments. Highlight dominant emotion.

strategies.structure: Filter panel (Location, 15 Marketing Sectors) + List of AI-recommended strategies.
strategies.cards: Glassmorphism recommendation cards detailing Segment, Channel, Timing, Copy A/B, ROI multipliers, Confidence badges.

matches.structure: Match schedule sidebar + Ticket Demand & Match Stats main panel.
matches.components: 0-100 Ticket Demand gauge, Recharts sentiment timeline, Moments list (Goal, Red Card, VAR, Full-Time).

background_texture.description: Silver luxury premium abstract wavy texture. Use with high transparency (opacity-10) and mix-blend-overlay for a premium metallic grain effect.

hero_stadium_bg.description: Aerial view of a night football match. Use in the hero section masked with a heavy midnight navy gradient overlay (e.g., from-[#050914]/95 to-transparent) to set the mood behind the 3D football.

metallic_accent.description: Striking abstract metallic curves. Use for card backgrounds on the Strategies page with heavy blur.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark midnight navy (#050914) and silver/chrome metallic palette.
Do not use generic fonts. Import and use PP Neue Machina (or Cabinet Grotesk as fallback) for headings and JetBrains Mono for body/data.
Build the 3D football using @react-three/fiber in a dedicated component.
Use Framer Motion for scroll reveals and the custom cursor.
Generate robust mock JSON data to populate the heatmap, strategies, and match stats.
Apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements for automated testing.
